prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "侧平板" (side plank) exercise, front-three-quarter view from the open side. Person posture: Athletic person holding a left-side plank: lying on the left side with the left forearm flat on the ground (left elbow directly under the left shoulder, forearm perpendicular to the body); legs fully stacked with feet together, the left edge of the left foot on the ground; hips lifted so that the body forms one straight line from the left ankle through the hips to the head; the right arm extended straight up toward the ceiling with palm facing forward; head in line with spine; plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: obliques (especially the bottom side facing the ground) and quadratus lumborum. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: gluteus medius of the bottom hip and shoulder stabilizers (serratus anterior). Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "腹斜肌" pointing to the obliques (lateral core); "臀中肌" pointing to the gluteus medius of the supporting hip; "腰方肌 / 肩稳定肌" pointing to the quadratus lumborum and shoulder stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
